full_text:
Sun Yi (Shubi) 孫翊 (叔弼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Yi (孫翊), styledShubi (叔弼), was born in Fu Chun County, Wu Prefecture. Once a rival to Sun Quan. Assassinated by Bian Hong and others at a banquet. Sun Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
